name: DJ Pierre
title: Acid House Pioneer
bio: Co-founder of Phuture, DJ Pierre is widely credited with creating the acid house sound in 1985 with the seminal track 'Acid Tracks'. A true legend of the genre.

name: Aphex Twin
title: Producer & Composer
bio: Richard D. James, known as Aphex Twin, is one of the most influential electronic music producers of all time. Known for his experimental approach and pioneering use of the 303.

name: Maya Chen
title: Producer & Audiotool Curator
bio: Berlin-based producer and curator on the Audiotool platform. Specializes in acid techno and modular synthesis.
